title: Get IRN Alerts List
description:
This endpoint returns a paginated list of Irregular Rhythm Notifications (IRN) alerts, as well as all of the alert tachograms. This endpoint will only return alerts that the user has read in the Fitbit app already, as that is meant as the primary entrypoint for viewing notifications.

Note: The IRN API is for research use or investigational use only, and is not intended for clinical or diagnostic purposes.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: beforeDate
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss. Only yyyy-MM-dd is required. Either beforeDate or afterDate must be specified.

parameters.name: afterDate
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss. Only yyyy-MM-dd is required. Either beforeDate or afterDate must be specified.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The sort order of entries by date. Use asc (ascending) when using afterDate. Use desc (descending) when using before date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of entries returned. See Limit / Offset for more information. Maximum: 10

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: See Limit / Offset for more information. Supported: 0

response_fields.name: alerts : alertTime
response_fields.description: The start time for the irregular rhythm detection.

response_fields.name: alerts : detectedTime
response_fields.description: The end time for the irregular rhythm detection.

response_fields.name: alerts : serviceVersion
response_fields.description: The version of the service running when the alert was produced.

response_fields.name: alerts : algoVersion
response_fields.description: The version of the algorithm running when the alert was produced.

response_fields.name: alerts : deviceType
response_fields.description: The name of the device who generated the alert.

response_fields.name: alerts : windows : startTime
response_fields.description: The start time for the analyzable window (representing 5 consecutive minutes of data following the start time).

response_fields.name: alerts : windows : bpmData : dataTime
response_fields.description: The timestamp of the individual heart beat.

response_fields.name: alerts : windows : bpmData : value
response_fields.description: The extrapolated bpm value from the individual heart beat.

response_fields.name: pagination : afterDate | beforeDate
response_fields.description: The afterDate or beforeDate parameter of the request (whichever was specified).

response_fields.name: pagination : next
response_fields.description: The URL of the request that will fetch the next page of results.

response_fields.name: pagination : previous
response_fields.description: The URL of the request that will fetch the previous page of results.

response_fields.name: pagination : sort
response_fields.description: The sort parameter of the request.

response_fields.name: pagination : limit
response_fields.description: The limit parameter of the request. Maximum: 10

response_fields.name: pagination : offset
response_fields.description: The offset parameter of the request.
